evidence.scientific_clarity: Two-panel ROC+PRC for 4 classifiers with AUROC/AP in legends, diagonal reference, and prevalence baseline all match the brief exactly.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set; font stack leads with Arial/Helvetica (not DejaVu Sans default); consistent 9pt base, 10pt titles, 7.5pt legend.
evidence.palette: Explicit Okabe-Ito palette (#767676, #56B4E9, #E69F00, #0072B2); no red/green directional confusion; linestyle redundancy adds a second discriminator.
evidence.layout_density: figsize=(10,4) with tight_layout(pad=1.2); axis limits -0.02–1.02 hug the data; no gaping whitespace or label collisions expected.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: PRC legend placed 'upper right' where high-performing curves cluster, risking overlap with OursModel/Method-B; ROC legend placement (lower right) is correct.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdf.fonttype=42 ensures TrueType-embedded selectable text; figure.pdf is 38 KB (real vector, not rasterized).
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (38 KB), figure.png (192 KB @ 300 dpi), caption.tex (685 B), gen_figure.py (3.4 KB).
evidence.caption_quality: Leads with bold panel descriptions, states specific numerical findings (AUROC=0.930, AP=0.921), explains both reference lines, and reports held-out sample sizes (n_pos=120, n_neg=180).

overall_strengths: Okabe-Ito colorblind-safe palette combined with distinct linestyles provides dual-channel method discrimination.
Full vector fidelity pipeline: pdf.fonttype=42, svg.fonttype=none, and a 38 KB PDF confirm selectable, editable text in the output.
overall_weaknesses: PRC legend anchor ('upper right') conflicts with where the best-performing curves live; should be moved to 'lower left' or placed outside the axes.
DejaVu Sans is third in the font fallback list — on systems without Arial or Helvetica the figure silently degrades to the matplotlib default.
